# UsageDeck 0.6.0 beta 1

This first 0.6 beta makes Windows notification delivery easier to verify before relying on usage alerts.

## Highlights

- Shows whether Windows notification delivery is ready, blocked in Windows settings, or unavailable on the current system.
- Adds a production test-notification action to confirm notifications reach the Windows notification centre.
- Adds a direct link to Windows notification settings when delivery is blocked.
- Uses the standard Windows notification bell icon in Settings.

This is a pre-release build. Please report notification delivery or upgrade issues with the Windows version and installation type used.
